design_implications: Small bundle must be independently inspectable before full OS is required.
Bootstrap smoke must verify ZIP integrity, required members, commands, and full-OS locator.
Provenance paths and hashes should be external-sidecar bound where circular self-hashes would otherwise occur.

sources.claim: SLSA provenance only helps when consumers inspect and verify it.
OpenTelemetry provides APIs/libraries/agents/collector services to capture distributed traces and metrics for analysis.
OpenTelemetry project describes telemetry as metrics, logs and traces used to analyze software performance and behavior.
Bootstrap packages should have explicit, inspectable package structure.
